{{Quote|Someone has to rule the Empire, Sedriss—!|Sa-Di, to Sedriss QL|<ref name="DEII1">[[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Sa-Di''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] and an advisor to the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

Following the destruction of the Emperor's [[cloning tank]]s, Sa-Di believed Palpatine to be gone for good, and declared himself the ruler of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]. [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Military Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]] [[Sai tok/Legends|sliced him in half]] with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].
